Synthia MQTT Setup

Unconfigured installs open the setup wizard. Configured installs open the dashboard.

Setup Guidance-
Mode-

Direct Access Summary-

Wizard

  1. 1. Mode
  2. 2. Broker Details
  3. 3. Test
  4. 4. Apply
  5. 5. Done

Step 1: Choose Mode

Direct MQTT expected: no (gateway mode)

-

Step 2: Broker Details

Gateway-only mode: addon direct MQTT credentials are not provisioned for external broker mode.

-

Step 3: Test

External mode tests broker connectivity. Embedded mode validates broker config only.

-

Step 4: Apply

Apply selected broker mode settings to the addon runtime.

-

Operator action required (run on host terminal from addon root path):

Step 5: Done

Setup summary (secrets are masked):

Selected mode -
Broker host -
Broker port -
Core URL -
Addon URL -
Password status masked 
{}

Optional Docker Groups

Select optional compose groups to request. Base service runs without these groups.

Requested: none | Active: none | Failed: none

-
